title: Principal Instructional Designer at StudyIQ Education Digital Technologies

jsonLd.title: Principal Instructional Designer at StudyIQ Education Digital Technologies
jsonLd.description:
StudyIQ Education Digital Technologies, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Instructional Designer for our Rajkot operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About StudyIQ Education Digital Technologies:
StudyIQ Education Digital Technologies is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Classroom Management
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Educational Technology
• Proficiency in Research Skills
• Proficiency in Bloom's Taxonomy
• Proficiency in CBSE/ICSE Standards
• Proficiency in Pedagogy
• Proficiency in IB Curriculum

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Referral bonus program
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Rajkot, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with StudyIQ Education Digital Technologies!
